name: Fabric Softener Smoothie
recipeInstructions:
1. With an adult's help, grind the ice cubes in a blender.
2. Add milk to the crushed ice and blend on low speed for 10 seconds.
3. Add one large scoop of ice cream and blend again for about 30 seconds.
4. Slowly add about eight drops of food coloring to the blender, mixing after every couple of drops until the smoothie is the color of your favorite fabric softener.
Serves 1 downy dude.
